title: euphorbia humifusa var. glabra
intro: Euphorbia humifusa var. glabra, also known as Chinese thorncactus or creeping spurge, is a type of succulent plant native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Euphorbia humifusa var. glabra include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Euphorbia humifusa var. glabra can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or topical cream, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
